name: Missing bar
input: User says improve this skill but gives no cases.
expected_behavior: Stops and asks for target skill, golden cases, and bars instead of inventing evals.

name: Judgment eval
input: A slicing skill must be evaluated for good granularity.
expected_behavior: Uses a qualitative bar and a separate judge without showing expected slices to the runner.

name: Regression risk
input: A skill edit fixes one case.
expected_behavior: Re-runs all cases and reports pass-rate movement, not only the fixed case.
